title: The Gentle Odyssey
body:
This is a vanilla style mod pack that adds Pokémon and tasteful editions to Minecraft. With a peaceful play style and a slow paste grind, this mod pack should be good for well over 1000 Minecraft days. 


![Pokémon Style Home](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae014917d649465325e40bf039ed77fde8148a1d_0.webp)


Build a cozy Pokémon style house for you long adventure...






![Farmer's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bcde8de10dcb9006b58b7107b9a66f3ff7706f3_0.webp)


with plenty of other mods to keep you going forever!
